title: duchesnea chrysantha
intro: Duchesnea chrysantha, also known as yellow potentilla, is a flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its yellow and five-petaled flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Duchesnea chrysantha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
